description: A frozen dairy dessert made with yogurt cultures, giving it a tangier taste than most ice cream. It may be plain or flavored and is often served with toppings.
preparation_steps: Freeze while churning or in a frozen-dessert machine until smooth.
Serve soft or freeze further for a firmer texture, then add toppings if desired.

nutrition.calories: Usually low to moderate, but varies widely

health_advice.benefits: Often lighter than premium ice cream and may provide some protein and dairy calcium.
health_advice.risks: Many commercial versions contain substantial added sugar, and toppings can greatly increase calories.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Choose simpler flavors and control high-sugar toppings and sauces.

dietary_notes.note: Usually vegetarian. Vegan versions require non-dairy cultured alternatives. Gluten-free status depends mainly on toppings and mix-ins.

allergens: Possible gluten from cookies, brownies, or granola
